---
layout: cv
title: Kevin Gonzalez — Resume
---

# Kevin Gonzalez
Software Engineering student | Data Analytics · Full-Stack · AI Systems

<div id="webaddress">
<a href="mailto:gon22043@byui.edu">gon22043@byui.edu</a>
| <a href="tel:4254108570">(425) 410-8570</a>
| <a href="https://linkedin.com/in/kevin-gonzalez-">LinkedIn</a>
| <a href="https://github.com/kevingonmed">GitHub</a>
| Rexburg, ID
</div>


## Summary

Software Engineering student with experience in web analytics, structured data processing, full-stack development, Python, JavaScript, C++, SQL, REST APIs, and cloud-based systems. Strong focus on debugging, reporting, and building reliable technical solutions.


## Education

`Jan 2024 – Apr 2028`
__B.S. in Software Engineering__ — Brigham Young University–Idaho, Rexburg, ID

- GPA: 3.8
- Society of Artificial Intelligence
- Coursework: Data Structures and Algorithms, Cloud Computing, Databases, SQL, Linux Systems, Algorithm Design, Software Development, JavaScript, Python


## Experience

`2026 – Present`
__Web Analytics Integration Programmer__ — Brigham Young University–Idaho, Rexburg, ID

- Implemented and validated web analytics tracking across digital experiences, ensuring accurate interpretation of user interaction data.
- Analyzed user behavior data and generated reports to identify inconsistencies, trends, and navigation patterns.
- Verified tracking accuracy through structured testing and debugging, improving reliability of analytics reporting.
- Collaborated with analysts and technical teams to document findings and maintain organized reporting processes.

`Aug 2024 – Present`
__Assistant Network Engineer__ — Brigham Young University–Idaho, Rexburg, ID

- Configured and activated over 150 Ethernet switch ports across 10+ campus buildings, ensuring network availability for academic and administrative operations.
- Resolved 40+ system incidents using monitoring, logging, structured debugging, and root cause analysis, reducing downtime by 30%.
- Maintained infrastructure supporting 2,000+ devices across distributed network systems, improving reliability and scalability.
- Collaborated with IT teams to document issues, validate fixes, and improve system support processes.

`Oct 2022 – Feb 2023`
__Assistant Project Manager__ — Brilla Fest, Mexico City, Mexico

- Managed logistics for a team of 30+ personnel, including shift scheduling, task delegation, and real-time troubleshooting, achieving 100% staffing coverage and reducing delays by 20%.
- Monitored and optimized a budget of $100,000+ MXN, tracking expenditures and reallocating resources to high-traffic attractions, improving guest satisfaction ratings by 15%.


## Projects

`Feb 2026`
__PromptTrace__ — Hackathon Project | Python, AWS S3, AWS CloudWatch, GitHub Copilot, MCP

- Built an AI-driven system using Python and AWS services to capture and analyze 100+ interaction events per session.
- Designed pipelines to evaluate prompt quality, iteration behavior, and developer decision patterns in AI-assisted workflows.
- Integrated GitHub Copilot and MCP to simulate real-world human–AI collaboration environments.
- Delivered a working prototype under hackathon constraints, demonstrating rapid iteration and end-to-end development.

`Mar 2026`
__Apollo 11 Simulator__ — C++ Project | C++, OOP, Unit Testing

- Engineered a simulation system modeling 5+ real-time variables, improving understanding of system behavior and algorithmic problem-solving.
- Designed a modular object-oriented architecture with 10+ components to support maintainability and isolated testing.
- Developed unit tests to validate simulation accuracy and reduce logic defects during iterative development.

`Nov 2024`
__Rexy's Voice__ — Hackathon Project | Node.js, Express, MongoDB, JavaScript, REST APIs

- Developed a full-stack application using Node.js, Express, and MongoDB to support structured user interaction and behavioral data analysis.
- Implemented frontend tracking using JavaScript to capture engagement patterns and improve visibility into user experience.
- Designed REST APIs to process and aggregate user-generated data into actionable metrics.

`2024`
__Course Recommendation Web App__ — Hackathon Project | JavaScript, Full-Stack

- Engineered a full-stack web application to recommend courses, implementing features, testing functionality, and resolving defects.
- Designed and implemented user-facing features using JavaScript, enhancing usability and interaction.


## Skills

__Languages:__ Python, JavaScript, C++, C#, SQL

__Frontend:__ HTML, CSS, DOM manipulation, Responsive UI design

__Backend:__ Node.js, Express, REST APIs, MongoDB

__Cloud & Systems:__ AWS (S3, CloudWatch), Linux, Distributed systems

__Data & AI:__ Structured data processing, Prompt evaluation, Web analytics, User behavior analysis, Reporting

__Tools:__ Git, GitHub, GitHub Copilot, MCP, Debugging, Testing

__Core:__ Full-stack development, Debugging, Unit testing, Troubleshooting, Root cause analysis, SDLC, Documentation, Team collaboration


## Volunteer Service

`Aug 2020 – Aug 2022`
__Missionary__ — The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints, Tuxtla Gutiérrez, Mexico

- Led and trained over 50 volunteers across multiple regions, delivering workshops focused on effective communication, instructional techniques, and cultural adaptation.
- Developed goal-setting systems to increase team productivity and personal engagement, contributing to a 30% improvement in outreach efficiency.
